message: Jake
Fabar
Ah
I had something to tell you.
What kind of story is it?
Yeah, it includes some really hard-to-say things, but I think it might be important.
Hey, welcome.

Inside Trump Tower
This is the director's room. It feels a bit too luxurious for a place that’s only occasionally stayed in.
The living room, which seems to be mainly used for guests, is mostly filled with chairs. I can see why there would be a lot of visitors.
Outside the window, neighboring skyscrapers can be seen below. The higher up you go in these types of buildings, the more expensive they become; this room isn't cheap either.
His hair and beard have completely turned white, and there’s some fat around his belly. He’s probably reached early old age.
With incidents occurring one after another, it’s been a series of disasters culminating in the filming being halted. His expression is heavily marked by fatigue.
True, he’s at a good age, but he doesn’t feel old. It’s not hard to understand the rumors about actresses that keep surfacing.
Actually, there’s something very important I’ve been meaning to tell you.
Something very important?
Yeah. Actually, remember when I showed you that ring before? That was something I gave to Ginny.
I see, so that’s how it was.
What? You already realized? Yes, it makes sense; I must have seemed nervous.
I might have needed to say that sooner.
I’m really sorry for causing you trouble all this time.
Have you heard from Meryl?
No, nothing at all, which is why I’m worried. There's no way she’s somewhere...
...dead or anything, right?
Even though she’s usually annoying, not knowing where she is has me so worried it feels like my stomach is tightening.
I hope she’s safe.
I met Tonny through the Ginny situation. He was crazy about Ginny.
It seems like that, huh? Do you think he might be holding Ginny captive?
I doubt it. He wouldn’t go as far as cutting off her wrists. Besides, he said he feels Ginny is dead.
He might have fallen victim to the poisonous fangs of that woman named Ginny.
Why did you even think of using Guy in the movie?
I hate to say it, my friend,
but to put it simply, it’s about the buzz. I didn’t expect much from his acting skills.
Ah, I figured as much.
Of course. But Guy might just become a great actor, if he’s willing to keep at it.
I wonder if he really wants to keep acting.
I don’t know why he started getting involved with Ginny. But I get that sometimes you want to let loose.
Are you talking about Kristy?
Uh, yeah. She seems a bit constrained, doesn’t she? So I just imagined that’s what Guy thought too.
Guys have moments when they want to let loose, right?
Do you have feelings for Jennifer?
We’ve talked about this before.
Did we?
I’m not trying to be rude, but I think you should just stop.
She’s not really someone I’d recommend.
Oh, speaking of which, Kristy once visited the location shooting site to see Jennifer. I wonder what that was about?
Kristy went to see Jennifer?
Yeah. It’s a rare combination, right? That was the only time, too.
I was surprised Kristy came to meet Jennifer.
As you know, the woman named Ginny is what you'd call a prostitute. But she has this unusual pattern of having four clients.
Who are those four?
Tony, Guy, me, and I don’t know who the fourth is.
As for the ring, it was initially meant for Jennifer. But she rejected it, and Meryl did too.
So that's how it ended up in Ginny's hands?
It's an embarrassing story, but it seems Ginny was planning to marry me. I just gave her a ring.
I don't understand women's hearts.
But I haven't kidnapped her or anything. Gabriela suspected I was being forced to marry and that I kidnapped her.
I see, so there were circumstances like that.
I should have said something sooner.
Ginny and I are just a prostitute and a client, that's all.
It seems like he's relying on alcohol to distract himself from Cindy's incident. I'm worried about how this will turn out.
Isn't the director supposed to do something about Meryl? He should have more responsibility towards her than me.
Can Meryl really bounce back?
He's a man burdened with various complicated issues.
Even if he's unrelated to this serial murder, he seems like the type to cause trouble someday.
If I were the police, I'd be the first to detain him, but why are the police ignoring such a shady character?
I can't trust what Tonny says. Maybe I should just leave him be like he wants.
So the movie production stopped and Guy's film debut is off the table.
It's unforgivable that he was keeping Ginny while he had a fiancée named Kristy.
That's not something I can forgive.
I feel like there are still things I need to ask Guy.
I wonder if Jennifer is involved with the director too. If so, why? To get a role? Or is it?
Is Jennifer the type of woman who sleeps with anyone? But why someone like me?
I haven't heard a word about meeting Kristy outside of the Party. What kind of talk did you have?
Jennifer and Kristy
They don't seem to have much in common. What kind of relationship do they have?
It was the one who gave a ring to Ginny,
the director.
Gu was manipulated by Tonny to
the director.
To have grown men at her beck and call, that's a horrible woman.
She seems to have racked up quite a bit of resentment. Coldly brushed aside or discarded, maybe there was a motive to target her.
The chances of her still being alive are almost zero.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
